lsp.justification: It correctly identifies `struct redisObject` in `src/object.h:100-118`, notes both `robj` and `kvobj` are typedefs of the same struct, and covers `refcount`, `OBJ_SHARED_REFCOUNT`, `OBJ_STATIC_REFCOUNT`, `OBJ_FIRST_SPECIAL_REFCOUNT`, and `iskvobj`'s zero-ref free-path role. It over-includes `type`/`encoding`/`metabits`/`ptr` as cleanup-related, but qualifies that they do not control counting logic and explicitly rejects `lru`, so the core GT scoring requirements are met.
